# Task: Migrate a Git Repository to Jujutsu

You are a developer migrating a project from Git to Jujutsu (jj). The repository is located at `/home/user/project` and is currently a standard Git repository. There is also a bare Git repository at `/home/user/upstream.git` that serves as the upstream remote.

You need to:
1. Initialize jj in the existing Git repository to enable co-location.
2. Add a new Git remote named `upstream` pointing to `/home/user/upstream.git`.
3. Fetch from the `upstream` remote.
4. Rebase your current working copy onto the `main@upstream` branch.

todos.content: Inspect repository state and jj availability
Initialize jj in the existing Git repository for co-location
Add upstream Git remote in jj/Git configuration
Fetch from upstream remote
Rebase current working copy onto main@upstream

input.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree && git rev-parse --show-toplevel && git branch --show-current

todos.content: Inspect repository state and jj availability
Initialize jj in the existing Git repository for co-location
Add upstream Git remote in jj/Git configuration
Fetch from upstream remote
Rebase current working copy onto main@upstream

Done importing changes from the underlying Git repo.
Initialized repo in "."
Hint: Running `git clean -xdf` will remove `.jj/`!

todos.content: Inspect repository state and jj availability
Initialize jj in the existing Git repository for co-location
Add upstream Git remote in jj/Git configuration
Fetch from upstream remote
Rebase current working copy onto main@upstream

input.command: git remote add upstream "/home/user/upstream.git" && git remote -v

input.result:
Migration steps completed in `/home/user/project`:

- Initialized Jujutsu co-location with `jj git init --colocate`
- Added Git remote `upstream` -> `/home/user/upstream.git`
- Fetched from `upstream`, creating `main@upstream`
- Rebased the working copy onto `main@upstream`

Resulting state:
- Working copy `@` now has parent `main@upstream`
- `main@upstream` points to commit `ba4e10fd` with description `upstream commit`
- The rebased working copy is currently an empty change with no description

If you need help or want to give feedback, join the Discord channel at https://getpochi.com/discord or report bugs at https://github.com/TabbyML/pochi/issues.
